info.name: AdMiro API - Complete Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for AdMiro Digital Signage Platform.

## Quick Start
1. Create an environment with `base_url` = `http://localhost:8000`
2. Run requests in order: Register → Login → then any protected route
3. Token auto-captures from Register and Login responses
4. Created resource IDs auto-capture into variables

## Auth Response Format
Auth endpoints return `{ message, user, token }` directly (NOT wrapped in `{ success, data }`).
All other endpoints return `{ success: true, data }` or `{ success: false, error }`.

## Rate Limits (Dev - Extremely Lenient)
- Auth: 1000 requests per minute
- Public data: 2000 requests per minute
- General: 5000 requests per minute

item.name: System
item.description: Health check and API discovery endpoints

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. NOTE: Auth responses use a different format — `{ message, user, token }` not `{ success, data }`.

exec: // Generate unique email per run to avoid conflicts
// Auto-set variables for all subsequent requests
console.log('Logged in as:', json.user.email, '| ID:', json.user.id);

item.name: Profile
item.description: User profile management. All routes require authentication.

item.name: Advertisements
item.description:
Advertisement CRUD and lifecycle. Public GET routes, protected POST/PUT/DELETE routes.

Enum values: mediaType = image | video, status = active | scheduled | paused | expired | draft

body.raw:
{
  "adName": "Winter Sale Promo Video",
  "mediaUrl": "https://example.com/winter-promo.mp4",
  "mediaType": "video",
  "duration": 15,
  "description": "Holiday season promotional video",
  "targetAudience": "All ages",
  "fileSize": 15360000
}

item.name: Displays
item.description:
Display device management. Public GET routes, protected POST/PUT/DELETE routes.

Enum values: status = online | offline | inactive, layout = landscape | portrait

item.name: Display Loops
item.description:
Display loop (playlist) management. Public GET, protected POST/PUT/DELETE.

Enum values: rotationType = sequential | random | weighted, displayLayout = fullscreen | masonry

exec: // Ensure display_id_2 is set (use second display for loops)

body.raw:
{
  "loopName": "Morning Ad Rotation",
  "displayId": "{{display_id}}",
  "rotationType": "sequential",
  "displayLayout": "fullscreen",
  "description": "Morning schedule for main hall display"
}

exec: // Use ad_id_2 if available (from the second ad created), else ad_id

item.name: Analytics
item.description:
Analytics recording and reporting. POST /record is public (displays report metrics). GET routes require auth.

Records analytics events for display/ad/loop performance tracking.

item.name: System Logs
item.description:
Audit trail and system logging. ALL routes require authentication.

Enum values: action = create | update | delete | status_change | approve | reject | other
entityType = display | advertisement | loop | user | system
